title: IVR - Blue Archive Train Pack
description: IVR - Blue Archive Train Pack, contains KCRC and MTRC Trains HD Model with Blue Archive Outfits for Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod
body:
![IVR - Integrated Train Pack Subpack Contents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3ab98e9489ae6663bc48a8361b936fba2efe8a9.png) ![Mika Train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d9213efbff47f561ca171227384425caf4bdd1c.jpeg)

**Overview** --- This pack main features Blue Archive Outfit KCR Trains.
此高清材質包內含有：九廣鐵路-第三代電氣化列車 (Blue Archive塗裝)
All trains contain textures in 3 levels of resolution.
所有列車皆包括1x,3x,5x材質解像度
**Before Download 下載須知** --- No modification and republish is allowed without the author's consent.
未經作者許可，禁止編輯及再發佈作品 **NTE Preload Optimisation** --- This resourcepack support NTE preload function, enable **NTE Preload** function to get smoother gameplay experience.
Please make sure NTE version is v.0.5.1 or above.
這材質包支持NTE預加載功能，可有效降低電腦效能負荷，NTE版本需要v.0.5.1或以上。
**IVR Packs** --- ![IVR PACK v8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4027e20f1283595bb8707fdc5de0867e234b477b_0.webp) **Train List 列車列表：**
--- ![train_banner_yuuka](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb6dee5f24685cd7df8c69aa30c219bc1b00bc60_0.webp)![train_banner_noa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97fb701825ec0213486ef0e017fa30cf2f07be11_0.webp)![train_banner_aris_battle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0bd350c1d814d59088b395918d130af6ded9a22_0.webp)![train_banner_kei](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/493db88a85de9f40944616b086ba0e831f18eb18_0.webp)![train_banner_mika](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6488b8c52a7259ec30aa827f6ae57c8d3908f099_0.webp)![train_banner_mika_swimsult](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15b83a5a64adf53080713af1acbfbceb5b3ff30d_0.webp)![train_banner_nagisa_swimsult](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7022e66601a7ef4269cc3f0244058e40e2950a35_0.webp)![train_banner_seia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44cd0f6ae6091cc7771e9e9c5ffdd30eba88dedf_0.webp)![train_banner_miyako_swimsult](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b74395ec6c5b2b53f5bb8af64c467154625c446_0.webp)![train_banner_takane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e505e79d5a2850e473f96a0f5e54418266daaf92_0.webp) ![ba pack train list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c65fb93c3499b1a7162a2a7917577aa7de0ecc7a.png) 1. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Hayase Yuuka/早瀨優香) with VA charms
2. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Misono Mika/聖園彌香) with VA charms
3. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Misono Mika/聖園彌香) (Door Indicator, Both) 4. [Blue Archive] MTR IKK-Train (Misono Mika/聖園彌香) with VA charms
5. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Tsukiyuki Miyako/月雪都子) 6. [Blue Archive] MTR IKK-Train (Tsukiyuki Miyako/月雪都子) 7. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Tsukiyuki Miyako/月雪都子) (Door Indicator, Both) 8. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Ushio Noa/生塩乃愛) 9. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Misono Mika/聖園彌香) Swimsult (Door Indicator, Both) 10. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Kirifuji Nagisa/桐藤渚) Swimsult (Door Indicator, Both) 11. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Yurizono Seia/百合園聖亞) Swimsult (Door Indicator, Both) 12. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Miyoshi Takane/三善貴音) 13. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Miyoshi Takane/三善貴音) (Door Indicator, Both) 14. [Blue Archive] MTR IKK-Train (Miyoshi Takane/三善貴音) 15. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Tendou Kei/天童Kei) 16. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Tendou Kei/天童Kei) (Door Indicator, Both) 17. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Tendou Kei/天童Kei) (Door Indicator, Interior) 18. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Tendou Alice/天童愛麗絲)[Battle/臨戰] 19. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Tendou Alice/天童愛麗絲)[Battle/臨戰] (Door Indicator, Both) 20. [Blue Archive] KCR Millennium Train (Tendou Alice/天童愛麗絲)[Battle/臨戰] (Door Indicator, Interior)
